Name: Acosta, Mico Angelo Q.
Quote: The only person you are destined to become is the person you decide to be.

Name: Bihag, Raphael Khandie B.
Quote: Doubt is a pain too lonely to know that faith is its twin.

Name: Cimafranca, RC Rech L.
Quote: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.

Name: Edios, Lee Benedict M.
Quote: The journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step.

Name: Estrella, Dave Matthew L.
Quote: Curiosity is the fuel of learning.

Name: Fuentes, Cris Nixon B.
Quote: The best and most beautiful things in the world cannot be seen or even touched - they must be felt with the heart.

Name: Gerondio, Francis Cris P.
Quote: It is during our darkest moments that we must focus to see the light.

Name: Manlegro, King Jonelle G.
Quote: Don't be afraid to give up the good to go for the great.

Name: Moran, Anthony James G.
Quote: Twenty years from now you will be more disappointed by the things that you didn’t do than by the ones you did do.

Name: Patangan, Ron Mishael P.
Quote: The mind is everything. What you think you become.

Name: Santillan, Roy Anthony Q.
Quote: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.

Name: Sareno, Matt Angelo C.
Quote: You don't have to be great to start, but you have to start to be great.

Name: Tangaran, Grisby Paul James L.
Quote: Life is 10% what happens to you and 90% how you react to it.

Name: Untal, Ray Emanuele P.
Quote: The difference between ordinary and extraordinary is that little extra.

Name: Afaga, Bea M.
Quote: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.

Name: Agawin, Caryl Jan Pauline G.
Quote: A dream doesn't become reality through magic; it takes sweat, determination, and hard work.

Name: Alipoyo, Ma. Alexine B.
Quote: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.

Name: Ampon, Crizza Alesandra May D.
Quote: The best revenge is massive success.

Name: Briones, Andrea Paola C.
Quote: If you can't fly then run, if you can't run then walk, if you can't walk then crawl, but whatever you do you have to keep moving forward.

Name: Macute, Mayumi V.
Quote: The only person you are destined to become is the person you decide to be.

Name: Pacalioga, Leigh V.
Quote: The purpose of life is not to be happy. It is to be useful, to be honorable, to be compassionate, to have it make some difference that you have lived and lived well.

Name: Piezas, Bonn Camilo M.
Quote: You may say I'm a dreamer, but I'm not the only one. I hope someday you'll join us. And the world will live as one.

Name: Rosendo, Jeruz Pauline C.
Quote: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.

Name: Santisas, Pauleen Angela V.
Quote: The best time to plant a tree was 20 years ago. The second best time is now.

Name: Tan, Gabrielle Pauleen O.
Quote: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow will be our doubts of today.
